Bash(cd /c/Users/Home/Desktop/dispo-chatv2 && echo "=== ROOT ===" && cat package.json 2>/dev/null | grep -A20 '"scripts"'; echo "=== WEB ===" && cat web/package.json | grep -A15 '"scripts"'; echo "=== SERVER ===" && cat server/package.json | grep -A15 '"scripts"')

Bash(node -e "const {Pool}=require\('pg'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const p=new Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); p.query\('select count\(*\) from users'\).then\(r=>{console.log\('users:',r.rows[0].count\); return p.query\('select count\(*\) from groups'\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('groups:',r.rows[0].count\); return p.query\('select count\(*\) from messages'\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('messages:',r.rows[0].count\)}\).catch\(e=>console.error\('DB ERROR:',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.end\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {Pool}=require\('pg'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const p=new Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); \(async\(\)=>{const u=await p.query\(\\"select id,email from users where email='dispatcher@dispo-chat.local'\\"\); const uid=u.rows[0].id; console.log\('uid',uid\); const g=await p.query\(\\"select g.id,g.type,g.name,\(select count\(*\) from messages m where m.group_id=g.id\) as msgs from groups g join group_members gm on gm.group_id=g.id where gm.user_id=\\$1 order by g.last_message_at desc nulls last\\",[uid]\); console.table\(g.rows\); await p.end\(\)}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {Pool}=require\('pg'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'/c/Users/Home/Desktop/dispo-chatv2/server/.env'}\); const p=new Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); \(async\(\)=>{const r=await p.query\(\\"select u.id,u.email,u.display_name,u.workspace_id from users u where u.workspace_id=\(select workspace_id from users where email='dispatcher@dispo-chat.local'\)\\"\); console.table\(r.rows\); await p.end\(\)}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {Pool}=require\('pg'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const p=new Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); \(async\(\)=>{const c=await p.connect\(\); try{await c.query\('begin'\); const ws='6ec5cfab-5801-4829-957c-e3b7ea49affc'; const g=await c.query\(\\"select id from groups where workspace_id=\\$1 and name like 'QA Cache%'\\",[ws]\); const ids=g.rows.map\(r=>r.id\); console.log\('removing groups:',ids\); if\(ids.length\){await c.query\('delete from message_deletions where message_id in \(select id from messages where group_id = any\(\\$1::uuid[]\)\)',[ids]\); await c.query\('delete from attachments where message_id in \(select id from messages where group_id = any\(\\$1::uuid[]\)\)',[ids]\); await c.query\('delete from messages where group_id = any\(\\$1::uuid[]\)',[ids]\); await c.query\('delete from group_members where group_id = any\(\\$1::uuid[]\)',[ids]\); await c.query\('delete from groups where id = any\(\\$1::uuid[]\)',[ids]\);} await c.query\('commit'\); console.log\('cleanup done'\); }catch\(e\){await c.query\('rollback'\); throw e;} finally{c.release\(\); await p.end\(\);}}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")
